title: Statistics and Census Service (Macau)
summary: The Statistics and Census Service (Portuguese: Direcção dos Serviços de Estatística e Censos, DSEC; Chinese: 統計暨普查局) is the statistics agency of Macau. Its head office is on the 17th floor of Dynasty Plaza (皇朝廣場) in Sé (Cathedral Parish).
text: The Statistics and Census Service (Portuguese: Direcção dos Serviços de Estatística e Censos, DSEC; Chinese: 統計暨普查局) is the statistics agency of Macau. Its head office is on the 17th floor of Dynasty Plaza (皇朝廣場) in Sé (Cathedral Parish).
